tweets.text:
You borrowed bananas from investors promising ~10% dividends. 

Payments are getting heavy.

Smart move: Borrow cheaper (~5-6%) from lenders using your massive banana stack (BTC) as collateral. 

Use it to buy back the expensive preferreds trading at a discount (STRC, STRK and STRD)

Saves hundreds of millions yearly, boosts NAV, restores confidence.

BTC up = way easier & stronger. 

Simply survive.
